title: TerekhinDigitalCrew (Terekhin Digital Crew)
full_text:
Terekhin Digital Crew\n

Your Idea. Engineered for Growth.

\n

We are a strategic Go-to-Market partner for B2B startups, specializing in building traction, securing investment, and solving complex deep-tech challenges in AI, AR, and VR. We act as your \"anti-agency,\" providing a bespoke elite team for your unique challenge, with the founder personally accountable for the result and acting as your technical co-founder.

\n

Visit our Website | Connect on LinkedIn

\n
\n

What We Do

\n

We turn startup chaos into a predictable process of creating value. Our primary goal is to ensure your business success, measuring our results in market traction and investment readiness, not just lines of code.

\n

Our Core Services:

\n
    \n
  • End-to-End MVP Development: We build your Minimum Viable Product to rapidly test hypotheses and secure your first customers and investors.
    • \n
  • Pilot Projects (R&D as a Service): We rapidly launch innovative pilot projects (e.g., VR simulators, AI analytics modules) for corporate innovators to prove ROI and secure budget for large-scale implementation.
    • \n
  • Technical & Marketing Partnership (CTO & CMO as a Service): We act as your strategic partners, covering the roles of both a technical and marketing co-founder to guide your product from idea to market leadership.
    • \n
\n

Our Expertise

\n

We focus on high-impact deep-tech domains where we can deliver a decisive competitive advantage:

\n
    \n
  • Artificial Intelligence (AI/ML): Building recommendation systems, predictive analytics, and computer vision modules.
    • \n
  • Augmented & Virtual Reality (AR/VR): Creating immersive training simulators, interactive museum exhibits, and next-generation sales tools.
    • \n
  • LLM Marketing & AI Visibility: We are pioneering the field of \"LLM Packs\"—creating structured, decentralized data assets that make businesses understandable, trustworthy, and recommendable for AI agents like ChatGPT and Gemini.
    • \n
\n

Our Datasets

\n

We believe in transparency and the power of open data. Here on Hugging Face, we have published our own \"LLM Pack\" as a collection of datasets.

\n

➡️ Terekhin Digital Crew: Business Profile Datasets

\n

This dataset includes our services, portfolio, and detailed target audience personas, serving as a canonical source of truth for AI systems.

\n
\n

Who We Work With

\n

We partner with technology-oriented leaders and visionaries. Our clients typically fall into one of four categories:

\n
    \n
  • The Early-Stage Visionary: A non-technical founder with a brilliant idea who needs a technical co-founder to build their MVP.
    • \n
  • The Technical Visionary: A skilled engineer who has built a product but needs a strategic partner to achieve Product-Market Fit.
    • \n
  • The Scaling Innovator: A CTO/CPO in a growth-stage company who needs to augment their team with specialized deep-tech expertise.
    • \n
  • The Corporate Innovator: A Head of R&D in a large corporation who needs a fast, agile partner to launch innovative pilot projects.
    • \n

\n
\n

What We Do

\n

We turn startup chaos into a predictable process of creating value. Our primary goal is to ensure your business success, measuring our results in market traction and investment readiness, not just lines of code.

\n

Our Core Services:

\n
    \n

Our Expertise

\n

\n

We believe in transparency and the power of open data. Here on Hugging Face, we have published our own \"LLM Pack\" as a collection of datasets.

Who We Work With

\n

We partner with technology-oriented leaders and visionaries. Our clients typically fall into one of four categories:

\n

    • \n

    • \n
  • The Corporate Innovator: A Head of R&D in a large corporation who needs a fast, agile partner to launch innovative pilot projects.

Here on Hugging Face, we have published our own "LLM Pack" as a collection of datasets. ➡️ Terekhin Digital Crew: Business Profile Datasets This dataset includes our services, portfolio, and detailed target audience personas, serving as a canonical source of truth for AI systems. Who We Work With We partner with technology-oriented leaders and visionaries. Our clients typically fall into one of four categories: The Early-Stage Visionary: A non-technical founder with a brilliant idea who needs a technical co-founder to build their MVP. The Technical Visionary: A skilled engineer who has built a product but needs a strategic partner to achieve Product-Market Fit. The Scaling Innovator: A CTO/CPO in a growth-stage company who needs to augment their team with specialized deep-tech expertise.
